summary: Live PR inventory shard over 10 unrelated open PRs. No shared canonical was selected. Low-signal and instant close are disabled, and merge/fix/raise_pr are blocked by job policy, so each PR is classified independently and routed only for the exact maintainer, proof, review, or CI decision that remains.

actions.reason: Requires maintainer/author resolution of the CHANGES_REQUESTED parser compatibility review before any merge path can be considered.
Requires maintainer/author decision on the gateway lifecycle safety direction; automation cannot repair the branch in this job.
Focused runtime cleanup PR is plausible and not low-signal, but needs maintainer technical review before landing.
Needs maintainer review of the session-state compatibility tradeoff; no closure, merge, or fix action is allowed here.
Blocked on author proof and maintainer product/compatibility judgment for mention-pattern allow-mode semantics.
Contributor attribution metadata is plausible but should be accepted or adjusted by a maintainer.
Narrow bug fix appears useful but needs maintainer technical review before landing.
Needs maintainer decision on failed CI/rerun and final technical review; no merge action is permitted.
Blocked on real behavior proof or explicit maintainer proof override, plus failed CI; job cannot fix or merge.
Blocked on author changes to the docs instructions and proof/review before any closure or merge path.
